_comment: CLOSED-LOOP FOR USERS, CASH TO PARTNERS. A payout is allowed as real CASH only if the recipient's role is in partnerRoles OR the payout_type is in partnerPayoutTypes. Everything else — regular-user earnings such as referral_commission, contest_win, mlm_commission, reward — is blocked at the money rails and stays as on-site credit (redeemable via redeemRewardPerk). Enforced at the PayPal/CashApp/Venmo rails, so no function can cash out a user regardless of what initiates it. Widen/narrow the partner lists freely.
